name: Tahoe Resources Inc.
description: Tahoe Resources Inc. was a Canadian-based mining company and intermediate precious metals producer that focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of resource properties throughout the Americas. Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, the company operated significant silver and gold mining assets in Canada, Guatemala, and Peru. Tahoe Resources was publicly traded on both the Toronto Stock Exchange and the New York Stock Exchange before being acquired by Pan American Silver Corp. in 2019, marking the end of its operations as an independent entity in the global precious metals sector.
